title: Hunger Games Chest
description:
Adds a loot table for a basic hunger games chest. Includes custom items and items with custom attributes.

Check the desc. for commands
body:
Adds 2 chest loot tables containing basic hunger games items and custom items. As well as recipes for chainmail armor.

Use these commands to give yourself a chest with the loot tables:

Default chest: /give @a chest[container_loot={loot_table:"chests/hungergamesdefault"}]

High Chest: /give @a chest[container_loot={loot_table:"chests/hungergameshigh"}]

The items are as listed:
- Wooden sword and axe (enchanted with sharpness 1)
- Stone sword and axe (enchanted with sharpness 1)
- Iron sword and axe (some enchanted with sharpness 1)
- Leather armor (dyed white)
- Chainmail armor
- Iron armor (some with trims and protection 2)
- Wind Charges
- Ender Pearls
- Steak
- Bow and arrows (bow enchanted with punch 1)
- Creeper Spawn Egg (nbt data altered to behave as an unmoving bomb with custom fuse time)
- Knockback Stick (enchanted with knockback 2)
- Various Custom Potions
- Phoenix kit (grants various positive potion effects, balanced out with some negative potion effects)
- Shields (with custom patterns)
- Golden Apples (some enchanted)
- Golden Carrots
